caption: A man with glasses and a tall, silver, textured wig sits in a recording studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a small reddish-brown bowtie. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and a garment rack with clothing. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left side of the scene, while "BOSS TALK 101" appears on the right. Across the frames, the man remains relatively still, maintaining a serious expression and looking slightly to the left. Minimal movement occurs as he speaks, with slight shifts in his facial expression and head posture, while the background and equipment remain static.
